Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC622 "THERACE-2000-C622" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Race, The (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $2000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $2020 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $C622 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
Note: as the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $0548.
